fixesApplied.summary: Expanded the platform-admin raw-index panel by default for CRUD coverage and gave the nested AdminCrudPanel a unique page test id.
Drove the FLOW-31 primary platform-admin role, supplied the master-tenant header for direct dynamic API calls, and made screenshots viewport-qualified.
Made the FLOW-31 C6 role screenshot viewport-qualified.

verification.name: FLOW-31 Playwright desktop
verification.command: Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/design-intelligence-engine-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/design-intelligence-engine-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: FLOW-31 Playwright tablet
verification.command: Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/design-intelligence-engine-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/design-intelligence-engine-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-tablet --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: FLOW-31 Playwright mobile
verification.command: Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/design-intelligence-engine-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/design-intelligence-engine-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-mobile --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: FLOW-31 C6 role branch
verification.command: Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/c6-role-coverage-runs-22-44.spec.ts -g "C6-R31" --reporter=line --workers=1 --timeout=60000; Pop-Location

pngMatrix.note: FLOW-31 matrix covers 7 mock/default states and 4 CRUD screenshots across desktop, tablet, and mobile, plus platform-support read-only, tenant-admin FREEDOM-on, and tenant-admin FREEDOM-off C6 role branches across the same 3 viewports.

knownNonBlockingTypecheckDrift.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json; Pop-Location
